claims.notes: Use API/fixed judge scorer for paper claims, not the smoke-test keyword scorer. The join report, budget report contract, and downstream summary must bind the exact downstream_eval input, benchmark preferences, criteria predictions, judge provider, benchmark format, criteria unit field, pairwise call count, and paper_claim_eligible=true so stale joins or stale budget reports cannot satisfy this gate.

claims.notes: The offline reward re-scoring table is diagnostic only. Paper-facing reward-component ablation requires separately trained no-redundancy, no-validity, no-verifier, and coverage-only variants on the same hard-gold protocol, with training_done.json recording the verifier env for each trained variant. Verifier-filter ablation evidence must show that filtering does not increase hallucination and does not collapse semantic coverage. C7 fails closed if same-output re-scoring is the only reward-component evidence.

claims.notes: This gate audits recovered and lost human-gold dimensions under the same hard-gold BSC protocol; it does not by itself permit a dimension-level recovery conclusion. C12 also requires exact base/candidate input identities, input SHA binding to the BSC join outputs, query-level alignment with no unmatched or duplicate records, BGE embeddings, coverage_tau=0.75, verifier valid-flag filtering, and gold-row consistency so dimension-level transitions are measured on the same hard-gold examples.

C13 is only safe when the summary reports non-negative gold-category, nearest-gold category, and nearest-gold semantic-cluster coverage deltas for SFT+GRPO relative to SFT-only, shows non-collapsed generated-criteria dispersion and nearest-gold cluster-distribution entropy, shows non-degraded nearest-gold similarity, and uses semantic inputs whose hashes match the corresponding hard-gold BSC join outputs.

claims.claim: HealthBench-Hard and ArenaHard policy-level RLVR results are only reportable after evaluation-criteria policy reward training, policy GRPO, and benchmark evaluation artifacts are complete.

claims.notes: Do not write downstream policy-RLVR gains unless this gate is safe_to_claim. This extension is distinct from BSC training for evaluation criteria.
